headline: IQVIA Unveils IQVIA.ai, a Unified Agentic AI Platform Powered by NVIDIA to Improve Efficiency and Decision Making Across Life Sciences
summary: RESEARCH TRIANGLE PARK, N.C., March 16, 2026--IQVIA Holdings Inc. (NYSE:IQV), a leading global provider of clinical research services, commercial insights and healthcare intelligence, today announced at NVIDIA GTC the launch of IQVIA.ai, a unified agentic AI platform purpose-built to help life sciences organizations transform how they operate, make decisions and innovate across clinical, commercial and real-world domains.
